name: Adafruit CircuitPython Standard Gamepad
notes: 45-byte descriptor. Source: CircuitPython hid_report_descriptors.py GAMEPAD_WITH_ID. Report ID 0x05. 16 buttons, 4 signed 8-bit axes (X/Y/Z/Rz, range -127..127). No hat switch. Used by Adafruit Feather, QT Py, and other RP2040/SAMD boards running CircuitPython. VID:PID varies by board.
